manipulators.description: caps_lock + left_option held, caps_word on -> turn off

rules.description: 13-tab-disable: disable tab moved to left thumb
14-delete-disable: disable delete moved to left thumb
11-funcpad-disable: disable function keys moved to layer
06-cursor-disable: disable cursor key cluster moved to jkl;

manipulators.description: numpad layer: grave -> disabled on layer
numpad layer: hyphen -> disabled on layer
numpad layer: equal_sign -> disabled on layer
left_command + d -> tap: [ (scopes left), hold: Cmd
left_command + f -> tap: ] (scopes left), hold: Shift

rules.description: 08-numbpad-disable: disable number keys moved to layer

manipulators.description: sympad layer: grave -> disabled on layer
sympad layer: hyphen -> disabled on layer
sympad layer: equal_sign -> disabled on layer
spacebar + d -> tap: [ (scopes left), hold: Cmd
spacebar + f -> tap: ] (scopes left), hold: Shift
